spec.expr: sum((( (sum by (class_name) (rate(topic_model_input_classes_total[1h])) / scalar(sum(rate(topic_model_input_classes_total[1h])))) + 1e-5 )- ( topic_model_baseline_data_dist + 1e-5 )) * ln(( (sum by (class_name) (rate(topic_model_input_classes_total[1h])) / scalar(sum(rate(topic_model_input_classes_total[1h])))) + 1e-5 )/ ( topic_model_baseline_data_dist + 1e-5 )))

spec.description: PSI across all classes in Topic Modelling
spec.title: Overall Topic PSI

spec.description: Calculates the average inference latency (seconds) per image
spec.title: Inference Latency

spec.expr: sum((( (sum by (class_name) (rate(sent_model_input_classes_total[1h])) / scalar(sum(rate(sent_model_input_classes_total[1h])))) + 1e-5 )- ( sent_model_baseline_data_dist + 1e-5 )) * ln(( (sum by (class_name) (rate(sent_model_input_classes_total[1h])) / scalar(sum(rate(sent_model_input_classes_total[1h])))) + 1e-5 )/ ( sent_model_baseline_data_dist + 1e-5 )))

spec.description: PSI across all classes in Sentiment Analysis
spec.title: Overall Sentiment PSI

spec.title: Model Accuracy Decay
